MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jan-20-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SUTTER BAY HOSPITALS'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication.

Defendant Sutter Bay Hospital's motion for summary judgment is granted. Sutter satisfied its summary judgment burden showing that it is entitled to judgment in its favor against plaintiff Jaml Kazemi and Kazemi has not presented any evidence creating a triable dispute. No opposition filed.

Proposed order submitted.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)
